sentence: 这幅画保留了原初的设计风格。
pinyin: Zhè fú huà bǎoliú le yuán chū de shèjì fēnggé.
english: This painting has preserved its original design style.

sentence: 她每天晚上都喜欢画画放松心情。
pinyin: Tā měitiān wǎnshàng dōu xǐhuān huà huà fàngsōng xīnqíng.
english: She likes to draw every evening to relax.

meaning: to close the market (for the day); to close (a market, shop etc) for b
sentence: 今天股市收市时，上证指数涨了一点。
pinyin: Jīntiān gǔshì shōu shì shí, Shàngzhèng zhǐshù zhǎng le yīdiǎn.
english: At today's market close, the Shanghai Composite Index rose slightly.

meaning: (linguistics) part of speech; word class; lexical category
sentence: 老师让我们区分汉语的词类。
pinyin: Lǎoshī ràng wǒmen qūfēn Hànyǔ de cí lèi.
english: The teacher asked us to distinguish the parts of speech in Chinese.

meaning: (athletics) to take off (at the start of a jump); (of price, salary et
sentence: 这款手机价格从两千元起跳。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn shǒujī jiàgé cóng liǎng qiān yuán qǐ tiào.
english: This smartphone starts at two thousand yuan.
